rationale: All six ACs implemented: per-endpoint request_timeout_seconds, ResolveProviderRequestTimeout with override>endpoint>model-class precedence, 60-min thinking-model default (qwen3/deepseek-r/o1/o3/thinking), idle-vs-wall-clock comments clarified, error hint appended, --request-timeout flag on execute-bead and execute-loop.

findings.summary: AC6 prefix list uses substring match on lowercased model — 'qwen3' will also match unrelated future strings containing 'qwen3', but acceptable and easily extensible.
appendProviderTimeoutHint relies on string match 'provider request timeout' in error text; tightly coupled to the producer's wording but matches the observed log format.
